matched_records.topic_thesis: Rectification of Names matters because a leader who cannot call failure failure makes ritual truth-telling a farce.
matched_records.angle: Open on Zuckerberg says AI is letting one employee do the work of entire teams. Here's what the move says about the future of hiring. in plain language, then show how it makes the deeper diagnosis legible.
matched_records.hook: Meta didn’t just say AI is boosting productivity. Zuckerberg said one very talented employee can now do work that used to require entire teams.
